description: The ValueGraphRecorder component is used to show a graph of values over time with a specified number of points worth of history. As new points are added, the graph is shifted sideways and old points are deleted.

fields.RecordingUser: The user handling updates for this component.
fields.SourceValue: The field that will be sampled for values.
fields.UpdateInterval: The interval, in seconds, that the source field will be sampled at.
fields.Points: The number of samples to retain.
fields.TargetArray: The array to store samples in. Typically this will be the Values field in a StandaloneRectMesh<LineGraphMesh>
fields.TargetArrayOffset: The integer field to set with the offset of where in the TargetArray to start showing samples at.
fields.MinRangeAdjustThreshold: If a value in the graph goes beyond this value for currently shown samples, adjust the graph minimum value.
fields.MinRangeAdjustMultiplier: How much to increase the graph size downwards when adjusting for min value (1 is exactly to where the value edge is, 2 is add 2 times the needed value to show min on the graph.
fields.MaxRangeAdjustThreshold: If a value in the graph goes beyond this value for currently shown samples, adjust the graph maximum value.
fields.MaxRangeAdjustMultiplier: How much to increase the graph size upwards when adjusting for min value (1 is exactly to where the value edge is, 2 is add 2 times the needed value to show min on the graph.
fields.RangeMin: The field to drive with what the minimum range of the graph all points being shown is currently.
fields.RangeMax: The field to drive with what the maximum range of the graph all points being shown is currently.
fields.Drive: Whether to use drive fields to drive target values rather than field pointers. Makes the calculations local.
fields._arrayDrive: The field to drive with the set of samples. Typically this will be the Values field in a StandaloneRectMesh<LineGraphMesh>
fields._arrayOffsetDrive: The integer field to drive with the offset in the TargetArray to start showing samples at.
fields._rangeMinDrive: The field to drive with what the minimum range of the graph all points being shown is currently.
fields._rangeMaxDrive: The field to drive with what the maximum range of the graph all points being shown is currently.

methods.WriteValue: force a write of a value to the graph rather than waiting on ``Interval``

usage: Attach to a slot and use with a StandaloneRectMesh on a MeshRenderer with a material to view. Use either the fields or drive fields to drive aspects of the graph display for viewing the graph line.
